metadata.description: Socratic learning mode for Claude Code — educational insight types, curiosity-driven questioning, and a personal concept glossary that grows over time.

plugins.name: claude-socratic-plugin
plugins.description: Inyecta bloques de conocimiento contextual en las respuestas de Claude. 7 tipos de insights activables: Insight, Flow, Tradeoff, Pattern, Level Up, Concept y Curious.
